title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Shiprocket - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Shiprocket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
